project.name: TUGAS-AKHIR-VAR-TATA-SURYA
project.currentFocus: Fix dark camera preview and blank close-flow by enforcing AR layer stack, robust scanner teardown, and tighter model scale for mobile.

lastAchievements: Implemented explicit AR layer stack: video z0, canvas/scene z1, HUD z30, modal/toast z50+ to prevent dark/covered camera preview.
Added cleanupAFrameArtifacts and reordered teardown to remove residual AR.js video/canvas/loader nodes before returning to landing.
Reduced solar root model scale to 0.05 and fallback scale to 0.15 with root position 0 0.04 0 for smartphone-safe marker rendering.
Updated detail planet scales to 0.035-0.045 and lowered detail wrapper y-position to 0.14 for non-dominant AR detail view.
Improved camera switch flow: facingMode toggle, switch-in-progress toast, scanner-stay fallback warning, and post-switch marker reset.
pendingIssues: Final visual calibration still requires real-device check on Infinix Note 40 and iPhone Safari.
If tap hit-zones drift after final marker scale, hitZonePosition/hitZoneRadius tuning is still required.
nextBestActions: Run full on-device checklist for AR start, switch camera, close scanner, and reopen scanner cycle.
After hit-zone tuning finalizes, set DEBUG_HIT_ZONES to false for production visual cleanliness.
Capture browser-specific notes for Android Chrome vs iOS Safari camera-switch limitations.
validationState: npm run preview startup + HTTP probe (127.0.0.1:4173): PASS (200)

designContinuity.currentConceptualAnchor: Handheld optical instrument panel (camera-first scanner HUD).
